meaning: n.亚瑟(中世纪传说中的不列颠国王,圆桌骑士团的首领)
examples: I've broken off my engagement to Arthur.
Uncle Arthur, after a loud snore, woke suddenly.
Arthur was noted for the eccentricity of his clothes.
The tenant was accounting firm Arthur Andersen, which disintegrated before it could move in.
Arthur Caplan, the University of Pennsylvania bioethicist, says Merck had the right to cancel the study.
